validated_commands.build_notes: Use .dotnet/dotnet (local SDK), not system dotnet. Full solution build uses ./build.sh

completed_prs.title: [Efficiency Improver] Fix O(n²) hash collisions in DuplicateDataRowAnalyzer

backlog.title: BFSTestNodeVisitor: StringBuilder allocation per node
backlog.notes: In BFSTestNodeVisitor.VisitAsync, a new StringBuilder is created for every node in the test tree. For large test suites this can add up.

backlog.title: TestNodeUidListFilter: linear scan in BFSTestNodeVisitor
backlog.notes: listFilter.TestNodeUids.Any(uid => ...) is O(n) per test node. For re-runs with many failed tests this could be slow. Also ToPlatformTestNodeUid() is called inside lambda.

backlog.title: AbortForMaxFailedTestsExtension: LINQ Any with lambda vs Array.IndexOf
backlog.notes: Uses .Any(t => t == ...) with delegate allocation; Array.IndexOf would be more consistent
